creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
My disk isn't found with my ZFS on root system when I upgraded from 9.2-RELEASE-p10 to 9.3-RELEASE.

The issue is like I described in this thread: http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-stable/2013-July/074381.html (I suspected the cause was related to ACPI changes).

boot -v didn't help and I can't scroll back of bug 133989.
